name: Docker Optimize
description: Analyze Docker setup and suggest optimizations

input.command: cat Dockerfile 2>/dev/null || cat docker/Dockerfile 2>/dev/null || echo 'No Dockerfile found'
cat docker-compose.yml 2>/dev/null || cat compose.yml 2>/dev/null || echo 'No compose file'
docker images --format 'table {{.Repository}}	{{.Tag}}	{{.Size}}' 2>/dev/null | head -15 || echo 'Docker not running'

echo 'Dangling images:'; docker images -f 'dangling=true' --format '{{.ID}} {{.Size}}' 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo '---'; echo 'Volumes:'; docker volume ls --format '{{.Name}}' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs -I{} echo '{} volumes'
